description: Coylean glyph -> symbol assignments, edited in assign.html and downloaded. Keys are member indices: grid letter (V or H) + down-code digit + right-code digit (each 0-7). Naming a member makes it the identity (state e) of its D4 group; the orbit (both grids, via the backslash dual) follows. A trailing suffix relocates the identity: e=identity 1,2,3=rotations -=flip(horiz mirror) |=flip(vert mirror) \=backslash / =slash.
